retrieved_result: Which Fruits Have The Lowest Glycemic Load? LAST UPDATED November 17, 2017 by Fawne Hansen Which Fruits Have The Lowest Glycemic Load? A healthy diet should almost always include some fruit, and this is particularly true if you’re suffering from adrenal fatigue. The difficulty arises in choosing the best and most nutritious fruits to eat. Mos
